qa_pairs.question: What height details have a height exactly 5'8" in inches and exactly 172 in centimeters?
qa_pairs.sql:
SELECT height_info.height_id FROM height_info
WHERE height_info.height_in_inch = '5''8"' AND height_info.height_in_cm = 172
qa_pairs.canonical_question: Which height info entities with height in inch equal to '5' and height in cm equal to '172'?

JOIN playerinfo ON height_info.height_id = playerinfo.height
WHERE playerinfo.sum_7yr_gp >= 0 AND playerinfo.birthyear = 1982
qa_pairs.canonical_question: Which height info entities having at least one related playerinfo record (linked on height_info.height_id = playerinfo.height) with sum 7yr gp at least '0' and birthyear equal to '1982'?
